title: Part 2 – Question-Réponse : le contrat client
instructions: Écoutez la question et les trois réponses possibles. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.
audioText: When does the client contract expire? (A) At the end of this quarter. (B) Yes, it was signed last month. (C) The client called this morning.

choices: At the end of this quarter.
Yes, it was signed last month.
questions.explanation: "When does it expire?" demande une date ou période. (A) donne la période d'expiration. (B) répond à une question oui/non sur la signature, (C) est hors sujet.
